ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "france_size" TEXT /* Size equivalent in France */,
  "italy_size" TEXT /* Size equivalent in Italy */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* Size equivalent in the United Kingdom */,
  "usa_size" TEXT /* Size equivalent in the United States */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to the detailed size chart */,
  "fitting_guide" TEXT /* Brief guide on how the size fits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Further categorization within the category (e.g., T-shirts, Jeans) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Specifies if the category is for Men, Women, Unisex, etc. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being converted */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country for which the size is being converted */,
  "converted_size" TEXT /* Converted size in the target country's standard */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being rated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the customer */,
  "fit_accuracy" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size was accurate (True/False) */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Customer's preferred size */,
  "height" REAL /* Customer's height in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Customer's weight in kg */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
